title: His Wish.
content:
It is sufficient if we pray
    To Jove, who gives and takes away:
    Let him the land and living find;
    Let me alone to fit the mind.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "His Wish.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
